name: marketcheck-marketplace
description: Plugins by MarketCheck Inc. for automotive market intelligence, vehicle pricing, and inventory analytics. 7 segment-specific plugins for dealers, dealership groups, appraisers, lenders, insurers, financial analysts, and manufacturers.

plugins.name: dealer
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for car dealers (franchise and independent). Competitive pricing, inventory intelligence, stocking guides, daily/weekly/monthly operational briefings. Franchise + independent dual pricing with CPO-aware comparisons.

plugins.name: dealership-group
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for multi-location dealer groups. Group dashboard, cross-location inventory balancing, rooftop benchmarking, group rollup briefings, plus all single-dealer capabilities.

plugins.name: appraiser
plugins.description: Automotive valuation intelligence for appraisers and adjusters. Comparable-backed valuations with transaction evidence, regional price variance, wholesale vs retail spreads.

plugins.name: lender
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for auto lenders, lease companies, and floor plan providers. Depreciation tracking, residual risk signals, EV transition monitoring, portfolio revaluation.

plugins.name: insurer
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for insurance companies and adjusters. Total-loss claims valuation, settlement pricing, depreciation tracking, vehicle appraisal for insurance context.

plugins.name: analyst
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for financial analysts and equity researchers. OEM investment signals, dealer group health monitoring, EV transition intelligence, sector momentum reporting.

plugins.name: manufacturer
plugins.description: Automotive market intelligence for OEMs and brand managers. Market share tracking, competitive positioning, EV adoption monitoring, regional demand intelligence.
